name: a2a-event-x
description: A2A Event X — Session Hub MCP + merged Event Log for heterogeneous agents

scripts.build: npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/session-hub && npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/mcp-server && npm run build -w @a2a-event-x/cli
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/session-hub && tsc -p packages/mcp-server && tsc -p packages/cli
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test packages/session-hub/dist/**/*.test.js 2>/dev/null || node --test packages/session-hub/dist/core/*.test.js
